subcodes.first_line: O Nasru'llah! Render praise unto the Best-Beloved of the world, Who hath graciously enabled thee to attain that which, wert thou to possess the treasures of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نصرالله حمد کن محبوب عالم را که ترا فائز فرمود بامریکه اگر مالک کنوز ارض
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement
